summary: Status Timeline feature testing complete. All backend APIs verified (12/12 tests passed). Frontend UI components confirmed working with proper data flow from MongoDB through backend API to frontend rendering.
seed_data_creation: Order ORD-20260312-568F6C has 4 status_audit_trail + 3 status_history = 7 timeline entries with multiple sources (admin_adjustment, vendor_confirmed, vendor_update, sales_follow_up, system_auto)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Status Timeline feature fully implemented and tested. Order 568F6C is the test order with rich audit trail data. The frontend uses /api/admin/orders-ops endpoint (not /api/admin/orders). StatusTimeline component in OrdersPage.jsx renders timeline entries with proper structure: timestamp, status chips, user info, role badge, source label, and expandable notes.

backend_apis.get_orders_list: PASS - Returns array of orders with id field
backend_apis.search_order_568F6C: PASS - Found order with 7 timeline entries
backend_apis.get_order_detail: PASS - Returns order with status_audit_trail and status_history
backend_apis.audit_trail_entry_structure: PASS - Entries have new_status, updated_by, timestamp, source, role
backend_apis.timeline_sources_variety: PASS - Found admin_adjustment, vendor_confirmed, vendor_update, sales_follow_up
backend_apis.timeline_roles_variety: PASS - Found admin, vendor, sales roles
backend_apis.orders_table_columns: PASS - Has created_at, order_number, customer_name, payer_name, total, payment_status, status
backend_apis.long_notes_exist: PASS - Found entries with notes > 80 chars for Show more button

frontend_ui.orders_table: PASS - data-testid='orders-table' with columns Date, Order#, Customer, Payer, Total, Payment, Fulfillment
frontend_ui.order_drawer_opens: PASS - DetailDrawer opens on row click
frontend_ui.timeline_entry_structure: PASS - Entries have timestamp, status chips, user, role badge, source label
frontend_ui.expandable_notes: PASS - Show more/Show less button works
frontend_ui.newest_first_ordering: PASS - Timeline shows newest entries first
